meta.title: Open Source Directories (Experimental)
meta.description: A small experimental subset from the main directories dataset for open-source projects and open-source alternative discovery.
meta.note: These entries are a subset of the broader directories data and do not increase the total unique resource count.

directories.name: SourceForge
directories.description: Repository for open-source software and project hosting.
directories.notes: High confidence: explicitly positioned for open-source software and project hosting.

directories.name: Open Alternative
directories.description: Open source alternatives to popular software.
directories.notes: High confidence: explicitly focused on open-source alternatives.

directories.name: AlternativeTo
directories.description: Directory for discovering alternatives to popular software and services.
directories.notes: Medium confidence: includes many open-source alternatives, but is not exclusively for open-source projects.

directories.name: EuroAlternative
directories.description: Discover European Alternatives to Big Tech Companies
directories.notes: Medium confidence: relevant to alternatives and independence from Big Tech, but not strictly open-source only.
